_meta.scope: Popularity/availability pass (owner standard: every row must be a proven seller within its tier, modern and available online). Web-verified 2026-07-21.
findings_kept: Idole Aura: officially NOT discontinued (Lancome statement); rumors were clearance noise. KEEP.
Mr. Burberry, Burberry London for Men: current or deeply stocked. KEEP.
Montblanc Legend Red: still sold by Montblanc directly. KEEP.
Elizabeth Arden Untold Absolu: discontinued then RELAUNCHED, buyable now. KEEP, watch.
Replica Flower Market (plain rows x2): listed under /discontinued/ on the US brand site but deeply stocked at retailers. KEEP, watch list with Lacoste/Velvet Orchid/Nautica Classic.
_meta.provenance: Pyramids compiled from general knowledge; entries with thinner documentation carry verify notes. No scraped content.

replacement.name: Yara
replacement.description: Creamy vanilla and soft orchid with a fruity glow. One of the best-selling budget fragrances in the world right now.
replacement.note: Angel Muse is on Mugler's own discontinued-products page. Yara is a top Amazon seller, modern and cheap. Pyramid from general knowledge; verify against a retailer listing.

replacement.name: Khamrah
replacement.description: Spiced dates and praline over warm vanilla and amber. A modern viral bestseller with real evening presence.
replacement.note: Mugler Aura is on Mugler's own discontinued-products page. Khamrah is one of the highest-volume online sellers in fragrance today.

replacement.name: Bloom
replacement.description: A lush white-floral built on tuberose and jasmine. The core Bloom, a current pillar that sells year after year.
replacement.note: Acqua di Fiori flanker verified discontinued 2026-07-21; replaced by the living core product. Gucci publishes Bloom as a floral trio; base notes flagged for verification.

replacement.name: Bloom
replacement.description: A lush white-floral built on tuberose and jasmine. The core Bloom, a current pillar that sells year after year.
replacement.note: Same replacement as the female_sport row; one product, two pools, identical record.

replacement.name: Another 13
replacement.description: A radiant skin-musk built around ambroxan. Clean, magnetic and the house's second-biggest seller after Santal 33.
replacement.note: Citron 28 is a Seoul city exclusive sold online only one month per year, which fails the available-online standard. Another 13 is core line, year-round. Pyramid flagged for verification.

replacement.name: Rose 31
replacement.description: A rose roughened with cumin and smoky woods. Warm, spicy and deliberately unisex despite the name.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: 'Rose 31 Intense' does not exist (verified against Le Labo's line 2026-07-21). Same product family, corrected identity.

replacement.name: Replica Bubble Bath
replacement.description: Warm soap bubbles, coconut milk and clean musk. Cozy, intimate and one of the line's current favorites.
replacement.note: 'Flower Market Night' does not exist (verified against the Replica line 2026-07-21). Replaced with a current, popular Replica not already in this pool. Pyramid flagged for verification.
